name: Spirited Coffee Punch
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Kahlua or other coffee-flavored liqueur
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine water, coffee granules, and sugar in a large pitcher. Stir until the coffee dissolves.
2. Chill the mixture.
3. Add Kahlua, milk, vanilla, and ice cream to the pitcher. Stir until well blended.
4. Pour the beverage into glasses.
5. Top each glass with whipped cream if desired.
Per 1/2-cup serving: 87 calories (6 percent from protein, 53 percent from carbohydrates, 24 percent from fat, 17 percent from alcohol). Exchanges: 1/2 bread, 1/2 fat. Makes 14 cups.
